use serde::Deserialize;
use std::io::Read;

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Record {
    id: u64,
    value: String,
}

fn load_all_records(reader: impl Read) -> Result<Vec<Record>, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let records: Vec<Record> = serde_json::from_reader(reader)?;
    Ok(records)
}

fn process_large_file(path: &str) -> Result<u64, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let file = std::fs::File::open(path)?;
    let records: Vec<Record> = serde_json::from_reader(file)?;
    let total: u64 = records.iter().map(|r| r.id).sum();
    Ok(total)
}

fn count_entries(reader: impl Read) -> Result<usize, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data: Vec<serde_json::Value> = serde_json::from_reader(reader)?;
    Ok(data.len())
}
